changeSet.author: MARKETING
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE creatives ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
-- BasePlatformEntity user_id BIGINT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR(20), ad_account_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, external_id VARCHAR(100), -- nullable = drafts allowed created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, updated_at TIMESTAMP, platform VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, image_hash VARCHAR(255),
-- creative-specific link_url TEXT,
-- MODE 1 (optional) page_post_id BIGINT NULL,
-- MODE 2 (optional) page_id VARCHAR(100) NULL,
CONSTRAINT fk_creative_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),
CONSTRAINT fk_creative_pagepost FOREIGN KEY (page_post_id) REFERENCES page_posts(id),
CONSTRAINT uk_creative_external UNIQUE (user_id, platform, ad_account_id, external_id) );
-- Optional: prevent linking the SAME page_post twice (if that’s a business rule) CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ux_creatives_page_post_id_not_null ON creatives(page_post_id) WHERE page_post_id IS NOT NULL;
